{"society_power": 2.0, "state_power": 2.0, "society_change": -1.0, "state_change": -1.0, "key_event": "Two Congo Wars; state collapse into \"Africa's World War\"", "reasoning": "Back-to-back wars toppled Mobutu and partitioned the country among foreign armies and warlords, collapsing central authority toward anarchy; society, already thin, was devastated and fragmented into armed/ethnic factions despite churches persisting. The 2003 externally imposed transition only nominally reconstituted a divided state."}
